blockingIssues.description: Watch matching runs against `activeNews`, so active region/search/severity/entity filters suppress watch counts and notifications for articles outside the current view.
ArcPanel only derives shared stories from multi-country events, so geopolitical arcs created from shared-entity co-occurrence can open with no usable shared-story drilldown.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Document an explicit manual-review fallback when `scrutiny-feature-reviewer` Task launches fail, including what artifacts to write and how to report the infrastructure issue.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: This osint-advanced scrutiny run hit the same Task/subagent failure pattern as the prior osint-core scrutiny rerun: `scrutiny-feature-reviewer` launches did not complete successfully, so the reviews had to be written manually despite the skill only describing the subagent path.
